task_tokens_consumed: Is a multi-criterion-joint-sift token-pruning mechanism with explicit truncated-error bound anticipated by 2024-2026 prior art?

hypothesized_clusters.cluster_name: Attention-score-based KV cache eviction with error bounds
hypothesized_clusters.cluster_description: Methods pruning KV cache or tokens using attention magnitude as primary criterion with theoretical bounds on output deviation H2O Scissorhands FastGen heavy-hitter retention.
